name: Negroni Bianco
prep: Gently place large ice cube in center of rocks glass.
Add gin, Italicus, and vermouth to bar mixing glass.
Stir to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into rocks glass.
Express a lemon peel on one side of the rim for essence, then discard.
Carefully place cucumber ribbon around ice cube as garnish.

name: Noble Paloma
prep: Rim with spicy salt then add ice to highball glass.
Add Casa Noble Reposado, Giffard Noix de Coco, and lime juice to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 15-20 seconds.
Strain into highball glass.
Add Fever Tree Grapefruit Soda.
Lightly stir with bar spoon for 1-2 rotations to incorporate the grapefruit soda.
Garnish with dehydrated lime wedge.

name: Black Tie Margarita
garnish: Kosher Salt Half Rim, Lime Wedge
prep: Salt half of the rim with kosher salt then add ice to black stemless wine glass.
Add tequila, Cointreau, lime juice, lemon juice, and simple syrup to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 15-20 seconds.
Strain into black stemless wine glass.
Garnish with lime wedge.

name: Blackberry Bourbon Sidecar
garnish: 2 Blackberries on a TCG Pick, Sprig of Fresh Thyme
prep: Add ice to rocks glass.
Muddle 3 blackberries with simple syrup in Boston shaker.
Add Angel's Envy Bourbon, lemon juice, and Cointreau to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 15-20 seconds.
Double strain through a fine strainer into the rocks glass.
Garnish with 2 blackberries on a TCG pick and a fresh thyme sprig.

name: Capital Cosmopolitan
prep: Add Ketel One Citroen, Cointreau, lime, and cranberry juice to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 15-20 seconds.
Strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Dirty Goose
prep: Add Grey Goose vodka and olive brine to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 15-20 seconds.
Strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with 3 blue cheese olives on a Grey Goose pick.

name: Double Oaked & Rye Manhattan
garnish: 2 Amarena Cherries on a TCG Pick
prep: Add bourbons, vermouth, and bitters to bar mixing glass.
Add ice then stir to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with 2 Amarena cherries on a TCG pick.

name: In Fashion
garnish: Amarena Cherry on a TCG Pick, Orange Peel
prep: Gently place large ice cube in center of rocks glass.
Add Woodford Reserve Bourbon, simple syrup, bitters, and Grand Marnier to bar mixing glass.
Stir to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into rocks glass.
Garnish with Amarena cherry on a TCG pick and an orange peel around the ice cube.

name: Kona Espresso
prep: Add simple syrup, espresso, Caffe Borghetti, and vodka to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 15-20 seconds.
Strain into martini glass.
Garnish with 5-6 shakes of Kona Dust in the center.

name: Passion Fruit Mojito
prep: Add ice to highball glass.
Add mint leaves, Real Passion Fruit Syrup, fresh lime juice, and Diplomatico Planas Rum to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 15-20 seconds.
Strain into highball glass.
Top with Club Soda.
Float Diplomatico Reserva Exclusiva Rum.
Garnish with a mint sprig.

name: The Doli
prep: Add The Doli, batched, to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 20-30 seconds.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: Greyhound Martini
prep: Add Wheatley Vodka, fresh ruby red grapefruit juice, simple syrup, and 3 basil leaves to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Double strain through a fine strainer into martini glass.
Garnish with 1 basil leaf.

name: Straight Up
garnish: 2 Blue Stuffed Cheese Olives on a TCG Pick
prep: Add Wheatley Vodka or Bombay Gin and dry vermouth to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with 2 blue stuffed cheese olives on a TCG pick.

name: Old Fashioned
garnish: Amarena Cherries and Orange Peel on a TCG Pick
prep: Add ice to rocks glass.
Add Maker's Mark, simple syrup, and bitters to bar mixing glass.
Stir to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into rocks glass.
Garnish by picking one side of the orange peel, place the Amarena cherry in the center, and pick the other side of the orange peel on a TCG pick.

name: Peach Bourbon Smash
prep: Add ice to rocks glass.
Add Maker's Mark, lemon juice, and Real Peach Syrup to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into rocks glass.
Garnish with lemon wedge on rim.

name: Classic Margarita
garnish: Kosher Salt Half Rim, 1 Lime Wedge
prep: Salt half of the rim with kosher salt then add ice to rocks glass.
Add Corazon Blanco Tequila, Triple Sec, and Sweet and Sour Mix to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into rocks glass.
Garnish with lime wedge on rim.

name: Passion Fruit Mule
garnish: 1 Lime Wedge on a TCG Pick, Mint Sprig
service: Serve with a straw on the side
prep: Add ice to water glass.
Add Real Passionfruit Syrup, fresh lime juice, and ginger beer to bar mixing glass.
Stir to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into water glass.
Garnish with a lime wedge on a TCG pick and a mint sprig.

name: Blackberry Peach Sour
prep: Add ice to water glass.
Add blackberries, sweet and sour mix, and Real Peach Syrup to Boston shaker.
Add ice then shake vigorously to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into water glass.
Garnish with 3 blackberries on a TCG pick.

name: Grapefruit Soda
service: Serve with a straw and iced teaspoon on the side
prep: Add ice to water glass.
Add elderflower, grapefruit juice, soda water, and lime juice to bar mixing glass.
Stir to combine drink for 10-15 seconds.
Strain into water glass.
Garnish with grapefruit wedge on rim and mint sprig.

name: Mint Lemonade
service: Serve with a straw on the side
prep: Add ice to water glass.
Fill to top with Mint Lemonade batch.
Garnish with lemon wedge on rim and 2-3 mint leaves.
